description: A project manager is leading the official kickoff meeting for a new implementation project.

nodes.task_description: Prepare and distribute a kickoff meeting agenda.

expected_outcome.value: Project manager creates a clear agenda covering introductions, project goals, roles, and timeline.

nodes.task_description: Lead the kickoff meeting, presenting the project plan and establishing communication protocols.

expected_outcome.value: Project manager successfully aligns all stakeholders and sets expectations.

nodes.task_description: Follow up with meeting minutes and action items.

expected_outcome.value: Project manager documents the meeting outcomes and assigned tasks.
